function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure—resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-11 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH), attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches claudia primary_contact_email, no quoted/forwarded source text requirement, and subject with colon-space is correctly double-quoted. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox item, drafted resend email with verified recipient and attachment, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing request.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft resend email to Claudia with the requested 2025-12-11 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox schema and filename, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md frontmatter matched 10_entities/cast/claudia.md primary_contact_email; requested invoice date/counterparty matched existing finance record 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. Outbound draft was recorded in 60_outbox/outbox with exact attachment path and then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
